items.headline: Anaheim Ducks gain confidence entering Game 2 against Oilers
items.description: EDMONTON -- The Anaheim Ducks got their feet wet in the first Stanley Cup Playoff game for over half the roster and are ready to dive in against the Edmonton Oilers in the Western Conference First Round.​

items.headline: New Devils GM Sunny Mehta excited to start dream job
items.description:
NEWARK, N.J. -- Sunny Mehta took the Stanley Cup to his home state of New Jersey each of the past two years after winning it as assistant general manager of the Florida Panthers.
Now, he's hoping to do the same with his childhood team after being hired by the New

items.headline: Dallas Stars hope to be more disciplined in Game 3 of Western 1st Round
items.description:
DALLAS -- The Dallas Stars will find a straighter path toward advancing in the Stanley Cup Playoffs if they continue to kill penalties the way they did in Game 2 of the Western Conference First Round against the Minnesota Wild on Monday.

items.headline: Mats Zuccarello out for Wild in Game 2 with upper-body injury
items.description:
DALLAS -- Mats Zuccarello has an upper-body injury and did not play for the Minnesota Wild in a 4-2 loss to the Dallas Stars in Game 2 of the Western Conference First Round at American Airlines Center on Monday.
Zuccarello had three assists in the Wild's 6-1 win in Game

items.headline: Roope Hintz injury status update April 20, 2026
items.description:
DALLAS -- Roope Hintz remains out for the Dallas Stars, and the timeline for his return was pushed back prior to a 4-2 win against the Minnesota Wild in Game 2 of the Western Conference First Round on Monday.
The best-of-7 series is tied 1-1 as it shifts to Minnesota

items.headline: United Heroes League 2026 NHL Stick Tap for Service winner
items.description:
Shane Hudella said it all began with a question from Brent Burns and Derek Boogard.
It was 2008, and Hudella was at Xcel Energy Center -- now Grand Casino Arena -- dressed in his U.S. Army uniform when Burns and Boogard, then members of the Minnesota Wild, approached him.

items.headline: Senators confident they are going to play better against Hurricanes in NHL playoffs
items.description:
RALEIGH, N.C. -- The Ottawa Senators returned home in the wee hours Tuesday morning, bowed but not broken.
They hauled themselves onto the flight home, still stinging from a 3-2 overtime loss to the Carolina Hurricanes in Game 2 of the Eastern Conference First Round on Monday that put them

items.headline: Adam Henrique out for Game 2 for Edmonton Oilers against Anaheim Ducks
items.description:
Adam Henrique will not play for the Edmonton Oilers in Game 2 of the Western Conference First Round against the Anaheim Ducks on Wednesday (10 p.m. ET; CBC, SN, TVAS2, KCOP-13, TBS, Victory+, HBO MAX) because of a lower-body injury.

items.headline: Penguins hope to figure it out against Flyers in Game 3 of Stanley Cup Playoffs
items.description:
PITTSBURGH -- On Sept. 18, when the Pittsburgh Penguins opened training camp, there was little expectation. At least, not externally.
One of the model NHL franchises of the modern era was meant to limp through the regular season to a fourth straight year without qualifying for the Stanley Cup Playoffs.

items.headline: NHL EDGE stats leaders for 2025-2026 season
items.description:
NHL.com's fantasy staff continues to cover the latest trends and storylines in the League through the lens of NHL EDGE puck and player tracker stats. Throughout the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs, we will identify the leaders in key advanced metrics.
